GAME PASS / Microsoft Store (WinGDK) version.

Extract the contents of this folder into your Game Pass Palworld folder -
the folder that CONTAINS "Pal". Usually found at:
C:/XboxGames/Palworld/Content

You also need the WinGDK (XInput) build of UE4SS installed in
Pal/Binaries/WinGDK (rename XInput1_3.dll to XInput1_4.dll).
See README.txt for the full steps.
